units.content: US Patent 7,962,495 B2 was granted to Palantir Technologies on 14 June 2011
The patent anticipates measurer-as-entity under an ontology layer
Claim 12 retains measurer-as-entity specifically bound to the mechanism-1 marker-propagation dependency-graph side
Claim 1 and claim 13 ontology disclaimer explicitly excludes an object-type or property-type registry
The exclusion of object-type or property-type registry was tightened in version 6.2
The relevant specification detail is located at section 4.15
